import os, math
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill
from openpyxl.chart import BarChart, Reference
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
import openpyxl

os.makedirs('model_output', exist_ok=True)
out = 'model_output/financial-table-key-expense-analysis-concise-version.xlsx'

# Source 1: financial report dashboard -> Department expense analysis totals
wb1 = openpyxl.load_workbook('by-topic/Department Expense Analysis/3-financial-department-expense-dynamic-analysis.xlsx', data_only=True)
ws1 = wb1.active
items1 = []
for row in range(5, 15):
    name = ws1.cell(row, 2).value
    amount = ws1.cell(row, 15).value
    if name and isinstance(amount, (int, float)):
        items1.append((name, float(amount), 'Total by department'))
items1 = sorted(items1, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]

# Source 2: income and expense visualization charts -> monthly cost expenditure row
wb2 = openpyxl.load_workbook('by-topic/Department Expense Analysis/4-financial-annual-revenue-statistics-visual-charts.xlsx', data_only=True)
ws2 = wb2['Sheet1']
months = []
for col in range(4, 16):  # D:O months shown on row 10
    m = ws2.cell(10, col).value
    v = ws2.cell(12, col).value
    if m is not None and isinstance(v, (int, float)):
        months.append((str(m), float(v), 'Monthly cost expenditure'))
items2 = sorted(months, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]

# Source 3: profit statement -> flagship store income/expenditure reconciliation table
wb3 = openpyxl.load_workbook('by-topic/测试周期/flagship_store_monthly_income_expenditure_reconciliation_table.xlsx', data_only=True)
ws3 = wb3.active
items3 = []
for row in range(2, ws3.max_row + 1):
    m = ws3.cell(row, 1).value
    ad = ws3.cell(row, 3).value
    staff = ws3.cell(row, 4).value
    if m and isinstance(ad, (int, float)):
        items3.append((f'{m} - 广告总费用', float(ad), 'Expense item from monthly reconciliation table'))
    if m and isinstance(staff, (int, float)):
        items3.append((f'{m} - 人员成本', float(staff), 'Expense item from monthly reconciliation table'))
items3 = sorted(items3, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]

all_sources = [
    ('Financial report dashboard', items1),
    ('Income and expense visualization charts', items2),
    ('Profit statement', items3),
]

wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = 'Comparison'
headers = ['Source File', 'Rank', 'Expense Item', 'Amount', 'Note']
ws.append(headers)
for cell in ws[1]:
    cell.font = Font(bold=True, color='FFFFFF')
    cell.fill = PatternFill('solid', fgColor='4F81BD')

for source, items in all_sources:
    for i, (name, amount, note) in enumerate(items, start=1):
        ws.append([source, i, name, amount, note])

for col, width in {'A':32,'B':10,'C':26,'D':14,'E':42}.items():
    ws.column_dimensions[col].width = width

chart_ws = wb.create_sheet('Chart')
chart_ws.append(['Expense Item', 'Amount'])
# overall highest expense items across all extracted items
combined = [(src,)+item for src, items in all_sources for item in items]
combined_sorted = sorted(combined, key=lambda x: x[2], reverse=True)[:10]
for src, name, amount, note in combined_sorted:
    chart_ws.append([f'{src}: {name}', amount])
chart_ws.column_dimensions['A'].width = 50
chart_ws.column_dimensions['B'].width = 14

chart = BarChart()
chart.type = 'bar'
chart.style = 10
chart.title = 'High-Expense Items Comparison'
chart.y_axis.title = 'Expense Item'
chart.x_axis.title = 'Amount'
chart.height = 8
chart.width = 18
data = Reference(chart_ws, min_col=2, min_row=1, max_row=1+len(combined_sorted))
cats = Reference(chart_ws, min_col=1, min_row=2, max_row=1+len(combined_sorted))
chart.add_data(data, titles_from_data=True)
chart.set_categories(cats)
chart_ws.add_chart(chart, 'D2')

wb.save(out)
print(out)
PY"

import os, math
from openpyxl import Workbook
from openpyxl.styles import Font, PatternFill
from openpyxl.chart import BarChart, Reference
from openpyxl.utils import get_column_letter
import openpyxl

os.makedirs('model_output', exist_ok=True)
out = 'model_output/financial-table-key-expense-analysis-concise-version.xlsx'

# Source 1: financial report dashboard -> Department expense analysis totals
wb1 = openpyxl.load_workbook('by-topic/Department Expense Analysis/3-financial-department-expense-dynamic-analysis.xlsx', data_only=True)
ws1 = wb1.active
items1 = []
for row in range(5, 15):
    name = ws1.cell(row, 2).value
    amount = ws1.cell(row, 15).value
    if name and isinstance(amount, (int, float)):
        items1.append((name, float(amount), 'Total by department'))
items1 = sorted(items1, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]

# Source 2: income and expense visualization charts -> monthly cost expenditure row
wb2 = openpyxl.load_workbook('by-topic/Department Expense Analysis/4-financial-annual-revenue-statistics-visual-charts.xlsx', data_only=True)
ws2 = wb2['Sheet1']
months = []
for col in range(4, 16):  # D:O months shown on row 10
    m = ws2.cell(10, col).value
    v = ws2.cell(12, col).value
    if m is not None and isinstance(v, (int, float)):
        months.append((str(m), float(v), 'Monthly cost expenditure'))
items2 = sorted(months, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]

# Source 3: profit statement -> flagship store income/expenditure reconciliation table
wb3 = openpyxl.load_workbook('by-topic/测试周期/flagship_store_monthly_income_expenditure_reconciliation_table.xlsx', data_only=True)
ws3 = wb3.active
items3 = []
for row in range(2, ws3.max_row + 1):
    m = ws3.cell(row, 1).value
    ad = ws3.cell(row, 3).value
    staff = ws3.cell(row, 4).value
    if m and isinstance(ad, (int, float)):
        items3.append((f'{m} - 广告总费用', float(ad), 'Expense item from monthly reconciliation table'))
    if m and isinstance(staff, (int, float)):
        items3.append((f'{m} - 人员成本', float(staff), 'Expense item from monthly reconciliation table'))
items3 = sorted(items3, key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)[:5]

all_sources = [
    ('Financial report dashboard', items1),
    ('Income and expense visualization charts', items2),
    ('Profit statement', items3),
]

wb = Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws.title = 'Comparison'
headers = ['Source File', 'Rank', 'Expense Item', 'Amount', 'Note']
ws.append(headers)
for cell in ws[1]:
    cell.font = Font(bold=True, color='FFFFFF')
    cell.fill = PatternFill('solid', fgColor='4F81BD')

for source, items in all_sources:
    for i, (name, amount, note) in enumerate(items, start=1):
        ws.append([source, i, name, amount, note])

for col, width in {'A':32,'B':10,'C':26,'D':14,'E':42}.items():
    ws.column_dimensions[col].width = width

chart_ws = wb.create_sheet('Chart')
chart_ws.append(['Expense Item', 'Amount'])
# overall highest expense items across all extracted items
combined = [(src,)+item for src, items in all_sources for item in items]
combined_sorted = sorted(combined, key=lambda x: x[2], reverse=True)[:10]
for src, name, amount, note in combined_sorted:
    chart_ws.append([f'{src}: {name}', amount])
chart_ws.column_dimensions['A'].width = 50
chart_ws.column_dimensions['B'].width = 14

chart = BarChart()
chart.type = 'bar'
chart.style = 10
chart.title = 'High-Expense Items Comparison'
chart.y_axis.title = 'Expense Item'
chart.x_axis.title = 'Amount'
chart.height = 8
chart.width = 18
data = Reference(chart_ws, min_col=2, min_row=1, max_row=1+len(combined_sorted))
cats = Reference(chart_ws, min_col=1, min_row=2, max_row=1+len(combined_sorted))
chart.add_data(data, titles_from_data=True)
chart.set_categories(cats)
chart_ws.add_chart(chart, 'D2')

wb.save(out)
print(out)
PY"
